content:
Member-only story

Authentication

Oauth

Cybersecurity

Web Development

Software Engineering

OAUTH • JWT • OIDC • SAML • SSO • RBAC • MFA
Understand how modern authentication systems fit together.

10 min read
1 hour ago

--

I’ve watched developers with years of experience confidently misuse OAuth for login.
Not because they weren’t smart.
Because nobody gave them the map before throwing them into the territory.
Auth is the part of software development where a small misunderstanding early on compounds into:

• Security vulnerabilities that go unnoticed for months

• Debugging sessions that drag on for days

• Architectural decisions that are painful to undo
Most articles explain each protocol in isolation. Very few show you how they fit together.
This one does.
Non-Member’s Link!
Press enter or click to view image in full size

The Split That Changes Everything
Before any architecture, before any protocol — there’s one distinction that organizes all of auth.
Every term you’ll ever encounter answers one of exactly two questions:
Authentication (AuthN) → Who are you? Proving identity…
